title: Consumer Theory & Choice
description: Utility, scarcity, opportunity cost, consumer equilibrium, and the law of diminishing marginal utility

title: Demand, Supply & Elasticity
description: Law of demand and supply, equilibrium, elasticity, and market movements

title: Production & Costs
description: Short-run production, cost curves, and the relationship between marginal product and marginal cost

title: Market Structures
description: Perfect competition, monopoly, oligopoly, and monopolistic competition with Ethiopian examples

title: Banking, Finance & Economic Growth
description: Ethiopian banking institutions, financial intermediaries, economic growth vs development, and the business cycle

title: National Income & Macroeconomics
description: GDP measurement, national income accounting, consumption and saving functions, and aggregate demand and supply

title: Trade, Development & Ethiopia's Sectors
description: International trade theories, balance of payments, development indicators, and Ethiopian sectoral policies

title: Policy, Market Failure & Ethiopian Reforms
description: Market failures, fiscal and monetary policy, taxation, and Ethiopia's macroeconomic reforms
